summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OpsFlow dashboard functionality, API endpoints, and analytics integration. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), frontend dashboards loading with real data, ticket management and Jira integration functional.

flaky_endpoints.issue: WebSocket connection timeout - ping/pong communication not working

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection timeout during ping/pong test

passed_tests: GET /api/tickets/ returns 94 tickets with correct fields
GET /api/analytics/summary returns real data (94 total issues, 54 clients)
GET /api/analytics/issues-by-client returns 54 clients with issue data
GET /api/analytics/time-series returns 80 time series data points
GET /api/analytics/tat-by-client returns TAT data for 54 clients
Frontend Support Dashboard loads with ticket cards and tabs (All/Assigned/Unassigned)
Frontend Analytics Dashboard loads with charts and real data
Open in Jira button has correct URL format: https://grow-simplee.atlassian.net/browse/{ISSUE_KEY}
Resolve Ticket button works and updates ticket status to resolved
All brands displayed correctly (Giva, Shipdelight, Bombay Shaving, Nykaa, etc.)
Period filters working (1y, all time, etc.)
Charts displaying real data (bar, pie, line charts)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix WebSocket connection timeout issue - WebSocket endpoint is accessible but ping/pong communication is not working properly for real-time updates
